reviews.review_description: Near the end of the game when you are putting all the magic to discover the otherwhere, I discovered something directly behind it, which looked to be like another world you could travel to, but I could not physically interact with it
There are so many things wrong that I’m overwhelmed. It just leaves u hanging not know what to do or how I can go on and on. Just put together very poorly

So I went into this game with some reservations due to the mixed reviews, but wanted to try it anyway as I was attracted by the premise and graphics. Very pleased I did! Really love how beautiful all the worlds are, and the creative premise of flow weaving. 

I'm finding the puzzles quite satisfying now I've figured out what the game wants - basically, make sure you poke around and pay attention to the little details, and be aware that you might need to reuse some objects as well as make use of the meditate feature. I had to look at the online walkthrough online a couple times because I was tired and inattentive, but I think it's very possible to solve all the puzzles at an enjoyable pace.

The screen does freeze for a couple seconds while moving between worlds, I had to exit the game and restart once when it just stayed frozen, and the game doesn't always remember your last action which means I had to repeat some steps if I exited and re-entered the game so I'm taking a star off for that.

As mentioned in developers response, if you want to get past the voiceovers, you can do so by pressing the thumb stick I think, I managed to skip that way. Would've liked a written version of the voiceovers - the voice actors were good but I'm more a reader than a listener so zoned out during some of the longer audio bits. End credit music was lovely, and I like the tease of potential more flow weaver games to come. Would definitely be up for trying another one!

This game is not a magical experience to have fun, it's a very hard escape room with lots of frustrating and hard puzzles. I made it half way through before starting to take some hints from YouTube and then just using it to walk me through it all. It's also very short, you can complete it within an hour, and I regret not refunding it when I could. Absolutely zero things to do after you play and not even close to do a replay. It's not even a good escape room, it's just frustrating. So I don't recommend on it at all, not for children at least. Maybe you could find fun in it, but it's just really not my type, and I usually love puzzle games.

very fustrating with so many bugs and no ability to skip cut sceanes

update, the new version is no better, restated, uninstalled and reinstalled, don't know what more I can do,  SO PLEASE FIX IT!

reviews.review_title: Good at start, but the ending?
reviews.review_description: It's interesting but short story that didn't really come together properly. The ending though? Why end it like that? Very bizarre ending that made no sense. Also the puzzles like the gears in the underworld were not marked properly and can't see where to put each gear.
I love puzzle games and this one was really fun to do! The different worlds are gorgeous to look at and the interactions aren't too bad. I was able to play sitting, which was really nice to do.
It doesn’t work

developer_response.body: We'd love to help you troubleshoot if you search 'Games by Stitch' and click on our Discord link in the top corner - let us know what we can do to improve!

reviews.review_title: One of the worst games I've played
reviews.review_description: Absolutely not worth the money.

developer_response.body:
Hi Zaymama - sorry to hear you didn't enjoy playing Flow Weaver! When we first launched the game had some issues with bugs but we're happy to say we've just released a major update that addresses many of the problems. It's still a very "narrative forward" puzzle game where you really need to immerse yourself in the situation to solve some challenging tasks, so if that's not the right game for you we totally understand.

P.S. Some players really appreciate a new feature to skip dialogue with the left thumbstick - if you're keen to speedrun a game that's meant more for story, it's a feature that's open to you now.

reviews.review_description: Can’t get this game to work and will be asking for a refund

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you're frustrated razzy71 - some people have searched for "flow weaver walkthrough" online where we've placed a video tutorial for the entire game (filled with spoilers). We've also just updated the game with a complete upgrade to the saving system and game logic so it'll address any issues you've been experiencing. We'd love to have you give it another try now in it's new form!

reviews.review_description: Too many problems. After sitting (yes, you have to sit) through soo many cut scenes...I couldn't do anything. Just stuck in the very first room. No controls did anything. Went out and watched YouTube videos of the game and came back...still nothing worked. Unfortunately the return period was past by the time I realized I was never getting anywhere. So...waste of money.  With so many good games coming out with crisp controls and motion...this one misses the mark. Avoid.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you didn't enjoy the experience harmonda. Flow Weaver was designed to immerse the player in a new reality, and is very focused on the narrative. Many puzzles are linked directly to the story, and although there is a hidden feature to skip VO lines with the left thumbstick we don't recommend using it because it makes some puzzles even more difficult. We totally understand this type of game isn't for everyone, and we will try to improve our description of the game so players know upfront that they're getting a very story-focused game.

reviews.review_title: A great challenge and extremely fun
reviews.review_description:
I've really enjoyed this game and its storyline. Some puzzles were hard to figure out but you really just need to stay alert as literally anything around you can be useful in some way or another. 
I've finished the game but with that ending it feels like there can be more to come. I sure hope there will be more to explore and can't wait!

I wrote a whole thing on the game then switched apps and lost it. The long and short of it is that the devs care, they listen, and the game truly is a lot of fun. Mechanics- cool, story- interesting, ending- leave you wanting more!
Very fun game to play. Quite creative and smartly written. Thanks for the quick fix patch to make the experience smoother.
what a great cliffhanger to end on, makes great anticipation for a sequel

I thought apps bought through the Oculus Store were supposed to have been vetted, but this game is flawed in many, many ways.  The early reviews say the same thing.  I have had the game lock on me, the controls don’t always work, there are endless loops, and the puzzles are very easy or overly obtuse.  NOT READY FOR RELEASE!

developer_response.body:
It surprised us too when players found so many issues at launch! Thankfully we have spent the last month issuing patches for all known bugs and we're really confident this latest version will overcome those issues. Better late than never, and I hope you enjoy it the next time you try it out. Thanks for the feedback,
-- Evan on Flow Weaver Team

reviews.review_description: This game ultimately left me disappointed, it's buggy, way too short with a very disappointing ending. The visuals are good but that isn't enough to make up for it's shortfalls.

This game is fun and difficult, with good reason! The plot is great, and I only wish that it had more replay value.  If the puzzles were less "in any order" or changed based on whether you had completed the game previously it would be a good game to play more than once. Ultimately I would have enjoyed being able to solve puzzles in more than one of the realms, such as asgard as well as the realm you find yourself captive in.

This game was not great.  I wish I could have completed it but it has too many bugs and sticking points where I've had to start over from the beginning twice and still can't get to the final part of the game. In addition there is no hint or clue system to aid you. For some puzzles it is fine but there are some serious flaws you would never figure out without looking up walk-throughs. Even then the bugs can keep you from completing them and progressing the game.

Yeah, it was a bit buggy. But didn’t prevent me from restarting and trying again. I thought this was super fun. Although, I would’ve loved to have been able to walk around, and The ending really confused me. But overall I thought it was fun and wanted so much more.
